exact_remaining_blocker: native gdb can open/probe only far enough to show the stock DOS DM.EXE has no ReDMCSB symbol binding; need a DOS real-mode/source-symbol bridge or address map before F0359/F0380/F0377/F0280 can be proven
non_claims: does not prove original runtime reached F0359/F0380/F0377/F0280
does not retire pass175 on visual no-delta
does not use DANNESBURK or non-N2 references

source_audit.point: F0358 scans MOUSE_INPUT rectangles/zones and returns the matching command for the click/button state.
F0359 is the original click queue writer: records pending clicks, resolves primary/secondary mouse inputs via F0358, then queues command/X/Y in G0432_as_CommandQueue.
F0380 locks/dequeues command/X/Y from G0432_as_CommandQueue, processes pending clicks, then dispatches C080 to F0377.
F0377 is the C080 handler; PC builds subtract viewport origin and empty-hand C05 wall-ornament hits call F0372.
DUNVIEW stores front-wall champion portrait and D1C door-button clickability in C05_VIEW_CELL_DOOR_BUTTON_OR_WALL_ORNAMENT; startup clears the clickable storage.
MOVESENS identifies wall champion portrait sensors and calls F0280 with the sensor data/portrait index.
F0280 is the candidate transition reached from C127; it checks empty hand/party count and sets up the candidate champion path.
